word: H3803 - כָּתַר - kâthar - kaw-thar' - Beset round

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּתר

Transliteration: kâthar

Phonetic: kaw-thar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to surround
    1. (Piel) to surround
    2. (Hiphil) to surround, encircle

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1060

Part(s) of speech: Verb
